subcodes.first_line: The effulgent splendour and the radiant light encompass thy luminous resting-place and enfold thy sweet-scented tomb [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: البهاء اللامع و النور الساطع یحف تربتک النورآء و یغشی مرقدک الطیب الرائحه من
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @eulogies; reminiscences, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual transformation, @firmness in the Covenant
